nodes.context: A mostly Puerto Rican and African American street gang started in the South Bronx, New York during the late 1960s, involved in small crime activities.
A rival gang to the Savage Nomads.
A rival gang to the Savage Nomads, also used Nazi symbolism.
A rival gang to the Savage Nomads.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang was involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs Seven Immortals, Savage Skulls , and the Dirty Dozen.
edges.context: The Savage Nomads engaged in running battles with the Seven Immortals.
